docTitle: Baebol long wan skrol · Stat long Kriesen i go kasem Jos

share.title: Baebol long wan skrol
share.text: Long wan skrol nomo, faenemaot bigfala stori blong Baebol — mo from wanem Jisas i kam.

ui.loveLabel: Lav we i no save finis
ui.mythWrong: Rong tingting we plante man oli gat

epochs.title: Kriesen
epochs.one: God i mekem wan wol we i “gud tumas.”
epochs.events: Sikis dei blong kriesen, man i kamaot olsem pija blong God, ol Sabat blong spel
epochs.q: Bifo we bifo olgeta, God i mekem skae mo graon wetem olgeta samting we i stap long tufala.
epochs.christ: Wol ya i kamaot tru long “Tok.” Gud Nius blong Jon i talem se Tok ya hem i Jisas hemwan (Jon 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
Baebol i no stat wetem wan tingting blong filosofia, be wetem wan strong tok: “Bifo we bifo olgeta, God…” Wol ya i no kamaot nating, be hem i wok blong wan God we i gat laef.

  • Pija blong God · long olgeta samting we God i mekem, man nomo i kamaot olsem pija blong God — blong save hem mo lukaotgud long wol.
  • Spel · spel blong namba seven dei i soemaot we olgeta samting i finis mo i gat pis (shalom): “i gud.”
  • Iden · wol bifo we i brok, ples we God mo man i wokbaot tugeta.
epochs.next: Be gudfala samting ya bambae i brok smol nomo…

epochs.title: Foldaon
epochs.one: Sin i kam insaed, mo rod we i joenem man mo God i brok.
epochs.events: Oli kakae frut we God i tabu long hem, oli aot long Iden, ded mo had wok i kam
epochs.q: Yu mo woman ya, bambae yutufala i no laeklaekem yutufala … bambae oli stap smasem hed.
epochs.christ: Hemia fas promes blong gud nius, we i kam stret afta long Foldaon: “pikinini blong woman” bambae i smasem hed blong snek ya — mo hemia i Jisas (Jenesis 3:15; Rom 16:20; Galesia 4:4).
epochs.detail:
Tru long fasin blong wantem “kam olsem God,” sin i kam insaed long wol. Frut blong hem i no wan rul nomo we i brok, be hem i wan fasin we i joenem man mo God i brok.

  • Ol rod we i brok · wetem God (haed), wetem ol narafala (putum blem), mo wetem graon (ol nil mo had wok).
  • Ded · tok ya “bambae yu ded nomo” i kamtru.
  • Jenesis 3:15 · be long medel blong jajmen, promes blong sevem i kam fastaem. Ol man blong skul oli kolem hemia fas gud nius (protoevangelium).
epochs.next: Naoia God i singaot wan man blong stat wok blong sevem…

epochs.title: Ol Olfala Papa
epochs.one: God i promes long Ebraham se, “Bambae yu kam rod blong blesing.”
epochs.events: Promes blong God long Ebraham, taem Aesak i klosap ded, twelef boe blong Jekob, Josef i kam haeman long Ijip
epochs.q: Bambae mi mi mekem we yu yu gat plante pikinini … blong yu bambae yu kam olsem rod blong mi blong mi blesem plante man.
epochs.christ: Promes ya se “plante man bambae oli kasem blesing” i kamtru long Jisas, we hem i kamaot long laen blong Ebraham (Galesia 3:16).
epochs.detail:
God i stat blong stretem trabol blong ol man long wol long fasin blong singaot wan man, Ebraham. Senta blong hem i promes — wan bigfala laen, wan graon, mo “blesing blong ol man.”

  • Bilif · Ebraham i bilif long wan promes we hem i no luk, mo God i kaonem hem se hem i stret man (Jenesis 15:6).
  • Aesak mo Jekob · promes i go long nekis jeneresen; Jekob (Isrel) i papa blong twelef laen.
  • Josef · ol brata blong hem oli salem hem, be hem i kam haeman — “God i kafsaedem plan ya blong yufala, i mekem we gudfala samting i kamaot long hem” (Jenesis 50:20).
epochs.next: Afta long Josef, famle ya i go daon long Ijip — mo oli kam slef…

epochs.title: Eksodas mo Draeples
epochs.one: God i sevem wan pipol we oli slef mo i mekem olgeta i kam blong hem.
epochs.events: Ten panis, Pasova, oli krosem Red Si, Ten Loa long Sinae, tabu haos, 40 yia long draeples
epochs.q: Bambae mi mekem yufala i kam man blong mi nomo, we mi nomo bambae mi God blong yufala.
epochs.christ: Pasova — we blad blong sipsip i tanem ded i go — i poenem Jisas, “Pasova sipsip blong yumi,” we oli nilim hem long kros from yumi (1 Korin 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Bigfala sevem blong Olfala Testemen. Isrel we i slef bifo, God i mekem olgeta i fri tru long paoa blong hem mo i wokem olgeta i kam pipol blong hem.

  • Pasova · haos we i gat blad blong sipsip long doa, ded i pas i go nomo — fasin we evri sakrefaes biaen i folem.
  • Red Si · sevem long ples we rod i finis; “krosem” i kam pija blong wan niufala stat.
  • Promes long Sinae · tru long ol Loa oli lan blong laef olsem pipol blong God.
  • Tabu haos · wan tabu ples we oli save muvum, ples we God i stap wetem ol man blong hem — fas taes blong “Imanuel.”
  • 40 yia · from we oli no obei, wan jeneresen i wokbaot nating, be God i stap klosap wetem mana mo bigfala smok mo faea.
epochs.next: Oli stanap long maot blong promes graon, oli rere blong go insaed…

epochs.title: Winim Graon mo Ol Jajes
epochs.one: Oli kasem graon, be wetem no king, evri man i mekem samting we hem i wantem.
epochs.people: Josua; ol jajes olsem Gideon mo Samson; Rut
epochs.events: Jeriko i foldaon, oli setel long Kenan, sem fasin blong sin–jajmen–sevem i kam plante taem
epochs.q: Long taem ya, ol laen blong Isrel oli no gat king blong olgeta, mo evri man oli stap mekem olsem we oli luk se i stret.
epochs.christ: Long laen blong Rut i kamaot Deved, mo long laen blong Deved i kamaot Jisas (Matiu 1). Long medel blong trabol, laen blong Mesaea i go yet.
epochs.detail:
Aninit long Josua oli go insaed long promes graon, be afta oli setel, oli fogetem God kwiktaem. Jajes i sem fasin we i kam plante taem.

  • Fasin we i go daon · sin → trabol → singaot → wan jajes i sevem → sin bakegen. I kam nogud moa nomo.
  • Ol jajes · Gideon, Samson, Debora — ol man blong sevem we i no stap longtaem, oli strong be oli gat plante rong tu.
  • Rut · wan laet long wan tudak taem; wan woman blong narafala kantri i kam insaed long laen blong Deved (mo Jisas).
epochs.next: Pipol i singaot se, “Givim mifala wan king tu!”…

epochs.title: Kingdom we i Joen
epochs.one: God i promes long Deved se, “Kingdom blong yu bambae i stap oltaem.”
epochs.events: Fas king Sol, Deved mo Golaet, promes blong God long Deved, Solomon i bildim tabu haos
epochs.q: Bambae mi mekem kingdom blong yu i stap oltaem, gogo i no save finis.
epochs.christ: “Kingdom we i stap oltaem” i kamtru long Jisas, pikinini blong Deved — taswe oli kolem hem “Pikinini blong Deved” (Luk 1:32-33; Matiu 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Hae taem blong Isrel, aninit long tri king.

  • Sol · king we pipol oli askem; gudfala stat be i spolem from we hem i no obei.
  • Deved · “wan man we hat blong hem i folem hat blong God.” Hem i winim Golaet mo i mekem Jerusalem i kam bigfala taon. Hem i mekem bigfala sin (Batseba) be i tanem tingting blong hem stret long hat (Sam 51).
  • Promes blong God long Deved (2 Samuel 7) · God i promes blong mekem laen blong Deved i stap oltaem — bigfala rus blong tingting blong Mesaea.
  • Solomon · long hae blong waestingting mo plante mane hem i bildim tabu haos, be long en blong laef blong hem i tanem i go long ol giaman god.
epochs.next: Afta long Solomon, kingdom i brok i kam tu hap…

epochs.title: Kingdom we i Brok
epochs.one: I brok i kam saot (Juda) mo not (Isrel), mo pipol i go daon i go.
epochs.people: Ol king blong tufala kingdom; ol profet olsem Elaeja, Aesea, Jeremaea
epochs.events: Kingdom i brok, fasin blong giaman god i kam plante, ol profet oli givim woning
epochs.q: Nao i stat long taem ya, ol man blong not oli stap agens long ol king ya we oli stap kamaot biaen long King Deved.
epochs.christ: Long taem ya ol profet oli talemaot moa klia long Mesaea we bambae i kam (Aesea 9:6; Aesea 53).
epochs.detail:
Long taem blong pikinini blong Solomon, kingdom i brok: kingdom blong not, Isrel (ten laen, bigfala taon Sameria) mo kingdom blong saot, Juda (tu laen, bigfala taon Jerusalem).

  • Isrel (not) · evri king i wok long ol giaman god; i foldaon long Asiria long 722 BC.
  • Juda (saot) · laen blong Deved i go yet, wetem sam gudfala king olsem Hesekaea mo Josaea, be evri samting i go daon.
  • Ol profet · Elaeja, Emos, Aesea, Jeremaea oli singaot “kambak!” Tok blong Mesaea i kasem hae ples long hia (“slef we i harem nogud” blong Aesea 53).
epochs.next: Long en, jajmen we oli talem i kam — oli karemaot olgeta i go long narafala kantri…

epochs.title: Karemaot i Go
epochs.one: Kingdom i foldaon mo pipol i karemaot i go long narafala kantri.
epochs.events: Isrel i foldaon long Asiria (722), Juda i foldaon long Babilon mo tabu haos i bagarap (586)
epochs.q: Taem mifala i stap long Babilon … nao mifala i sidaon klosap long wota, mifala i stap krae.
epochs.christ: Long dip blong harem nogud, Jeremaea i promes wan “niufala promes” (Jeremaea 31:31) — sem promes ya we Jisas i mekem strong long Las Kakae.
epochs.detail:
Ol woning i kamtru. Tabu haos i bon mo pipol i karemaot i go long Babilon — oli lusum graon, king, mo tabu haos: lowes ples blong olgeta.

  • Tu foldaon · Isrel (Asiria, 722 BC) mo Juda (Babilon, 586 BC).
  • Daniel · wan pija blong bilif nating long haos blong wan giaman king (hol blong ol laeon); hem i luk visen blong wan “kingdom we i stap oltaem” we bambae i kam.
  • Wan smol laet blong hop · visen blong Esikel blong ol drae bun we i kam laef bakegen (Esikel 37) mo “niufala promes” blong Jeremaea i poenem fiuja long tudak.
epochs.next: Seventi yia biaen, God i openem rod — oli go hom…

epochs.title: Kambak
epochs.one: Oli kambak mo bildim bakegen tabu haos mo ol wol.
epochs.events: Oli kambak from oda blong Saerus, bildim tabu haos bakegen, stretem ol wol blong Jerusalem, kasem Tok bakegen
epochs.q: Oltaem hem i stap mekem yumi glad, mo fasin ya i stap mekem yumi strong.
epochs.christ: Malakae, las buk blong Olfala Testemen, i en wetem tok blong wan man we bambae i rerem rod blong Mesaea: “Bambae mi mi sanem wan man blong karem tok blong mi” (Malakae 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Tru long oda blong king blong Pesia, Saerus (538 BC), kambak i stat. Long tri taem oli kambak mo bildim bakegen samting we i bagarap.

  • Serubabel · i bildim tabu haos bakegen (i finis long 516 BC).
  • Esra · i tijim Tok bakegen mo i mekem bilif i laef bakegen.
  • Nehemaea · i bildim ol wol blong Jerusalem long 52 dei.
  • Esta · i sevem ol man Jiu long Pesia long taem we oli wantem kilim olgeta evriwan — “from wan taem olsem ya.”
  • I gat sting yet · tabu haos i stanap, be i no gat wan king olsem Deved. Pipol i wet long Mesaea.
epochs.next: Mo afta… olsem skae i kam kwaet, 400 yia i pas.

epochs.title: Ol Yia we i Kwaet
epochs.one: 400 yia we i no gat voes blong profet — be God i stap rerem stej kwaet nomo.
epochs.people: Aleksanda we i Bigfala, ol Makabe, Rom
epochs.events: Pesia → Gris → Makabe i kam fri → Rom i rul
epochs.q: Be long stret taem we God i makem, hem i sanem stret Pikinini blong hem i kam. Pikinini ya i bon long wan woman.
epochs.christ: Olgeta “rerem stej” ya i wok blong God blong mekem se Jisas i kam stret long “stret taem we God i makem.”
epochs.detail:
Stat long Malakae i go kasem Niufala Testemen, klosap 400 yia i pas wetem no niufala Tok. Be biaen long histri, God i stap rerem rod blong gud nius.

  • Ol bigfala kantri i jenis · Pesia → Gris (Aleksanda, 333 BC) → ol Tolemi mo Selusid → Makabe i girap (167 BC) → Rom (63 BC).
  • Lanwis Gris · winim blong Aleksanda i mekem Gris i kam komon lanwis; Olfala Testemen oli tanem long Gris (Septuagint), i openem rod blong gud nius i go kwik.
  • Ol rod mo pis blong Rom · gudfala rod mo “Pax Romana” i kam rod blong wok blong talemaot.
  • Ol haos blong prea mo ol grup · tijing long haos blong prea i kam strong; ol Farisi mo Sadusi oli girap; mo wantem Mesaea i kam mas.
epochs.next: Nao kwaet i brok — long en, hem i kam.

epochs.title: Jisas i Kam
epochs.one: Mesaea we God i promes i kam, i ded, mo i laef bakegen.
epochs.events: Tok i kam man, wok mo tijing mo merikel blong hem, ded long kros, laef bakegen long namba tri dei
epochs.q: Tok ya i kam man, nao i stap wetem yumi … mo i soemaot tu we God i tru olgeta.
epochs.christ: Pikinini blong woman (sin 2), blesing blong Ebraham (3), Pasova sipsip (4), king blong Deved we i stap oltaem (6), niufala promes (8) — olgeta i kamtru long wan man, Jisas: tru Profet, Pris, mo King blong yumi.
epochs.detail:
Kwaet i brok; man we God i promes i kam. Foa Gud Nius oli witnes long laef, ded, mo laef bakegen blong Jisas long foa saed.

  • Tok i kam man · God i kam man (Imanuel, “God i stap wetem yumi”), long smol ples blong Betlehem.
  • Wok blong hem · hem i tijim kingdom blong God, i mekem ol sik man i kam gud, i singaot ol man nogud. “Man we i luk mi, hem i luk Papa.”
  • Kros · hem i pem praes blong sin mo ded we Foldaon (sin 2) i karem. Tru Pasova sipsip.
  • Laef bakegen · long namba tri dei hem i laef bakegen, i brekem paoa blong sin, ded, mo Setan — finis long kros hem i “brekem finis paoa blong ol haeman … i winim olgeta finis” (Kolosi 2:15).

Taswe Jisas i tru Profet blong yumi (i soemaot rod i go long God), tru Pris blong yumi (i pem sin wetem bodi blong hem), mo tru King blong yumi (i winim sin, ded, mo Setan mo i rul oltaem).
epochs.next: Jisas we i laef bakegen i sanem ol disaepol blong hem i go long wol…

epochs.title: Jos i Stat
epochs.one: Spirit i kam, mo gud nius i go kasem en blong wol.
epochs.events: Spirit i kam long Pentekos, jos i bon, gud nius i go aot long Jerusalem i kasem Rom tru long trabol
epochs.q: Be taem Tabu Spirit i kam kasem yufala, bambae yufala i gat paoa … gogo yufala i finisim olgeta ples long wol.
epochs.christ: Stori ya i go yet tede. Baebol i en wetem promes se Jisas bambae i kambak mo mekem olgeta samting i kam niufala (Revelesen 21).
epochs.detail:
Afta Jisas i go antap, Spirit we God i promes i kam long Pentekos mo jos i bon. Gud nius i go aot kwiktaem.

  • Pentekos · Spirit i tanem ol disaepol we oli fraet i kam ol witnes we oli no fraet.
  • Pita · i talemaot gud nius long ol man Jiu long Jerusalem.
  • Pol · stat long man we i spolem jos i kam aposol, i planem ol jos long olgeta ples blong ol man we i no Jiu mo i raetem ol leta.
  • Go kasem en blong wol · Jerusalem → Judia → Sameria → Rom. Promes long Ebraham se “ol man” i kamtru.
  • Mo yumi · stori i no en; i go yet i kasem kambak blong Jisas mo niufala skae mo niufala graon.
epochs.next: Be stori i no en long hia…

epochs.title: Kam Straet Bakegen
epochs.one: Jisas i kambak mo i mekem olgeta samting i kam niufala.
epochs.people: Jisas we i kambak; ol kantri evriwan
epochs.events: Kambak blong hem, las jajmen, en blong sin·ded·wota blong ae, niufala skae mo niufala graon
epochs.q: Hem bambae i ravemaot wota blong ae blong olgeta. Nao bambae i no moa gat man i ded … bambae man i no moa harem nogud long bodi blong hem.
epochs.christ: Iden blong fas kriesen i kam straet bakegen olsem “niufala Jerusalem.” God i stap oltaem wetem ol man blong hem — fulwan blong Imanuel (Revelesen 21:3; Matiu 1:23).
epochs.detail:
Baebol i no en long taem blong jos. Las buk blong hem, Revelesen, i soemaot Jisas i kambak blong finisim olgeta samting.

  • Kambak · king we God i promes i kambak wetem bigfala laet.
  • Las win · Setan mo ded oli lus oltaem, mo Kraes i rul olsem King blong ol king (1 Korin 15:25-26; Revelesen 20:10).
  • Jajmen mo laef bakegen · evri rong samting i kam straet, mo ol dedman oli girap.
  • Niufala skae mo niufala graon · sin, ded, wota blong ae, mo harem nogud oli lus oltaem (Revelesen 21:4).
  • Iden i kam straet bakegen · long wan “niufala Jerusalem” we i gud moa long fas wan, God i stap oltaem wetem ol man blong hem — ples we ful Baebol i stap go long hem.

Taswe naoia hem i taem blong “i kam finis, be i no kam yet”: long Jisas, sevem i finis nao, be fulwan blong hem i stap kam yet.
epochs.next: Taswe, ful stori ya i minim wanem long “mi”?

core.title: Sin we i kam long stat — i no gat man we i stret
core.body: Trabol i no “sam rabis fasin” nomo, be hem i rus blong hat. Stat long Adam, evri man i bon aninit long sin mo i no save kasem God long paoa blong hem nomo.
core.vtext: I no gat wan man we i stret gud, i no gat wan man nating olsem … olgeta evriwan oli mekem nogud finis, mo oli stap afsaed olgeta long ol gudgudfala fasin blong God.

core.title: Loa i no save sevem mi
core.body: Loa i no wan led, be hem i wan glas. Yu traem moa, hem i soemaot moa we yu foldaon. Wok blong hem i lidim yumi i go long Kraes.
core.vtext: Loa ya i stap soemaot sin … Loa ya i stap mekem long mifala olsem, kam kasem taem we Kraes i kamtru.

core.title: Tru long gladhat — wan presen, i no wan wok
core.body: Sevem i no pe blong wok we yu mekem, be hem i wan fri presen long man we i no fit blong kasem. Taswe i no gat man we i save tok flas.
core.vtext: God i givhan long yufala long gladhat blong hem, i sevem yufala, from we yufala i bilif long Kraes … blong bambae i no gat wan long yufala we i save tok flas from.

core.title: Stret man tru long bilif
core.body: I no tru long fasin blong folem Loa, be tru long bilif long Jisas Kraes, God i kaonem yu se yu stret man — yu no werem stret fasin blong yu, be stret fasin blong hem.
core.vtext: Nao from we yumi bilif long God, hem i luk yumi se yumi stret man finis long fes blong hem … man i no save kam stret man long fes blong God samtaem, long fasin ya we hem i stap folem Loa.

core.title: Baebol i poenem Jisas
core.body: Baebol i no wan buk blong ol bigfala man no blong givhan long yu yu wan. Stat long Jenesis i go kasem Revelesen, evri pej i witnes long wan man — Jisas Kraes.
core.vtext: Ol tok blong Baebol ya oli stap tokbaot mi … Jisas i stat long buk blong Moses, mo i gotru long ol tok blong ol profet, i talemaotgud long tufala, olgeta tok blong Baebol we oli bin raetem blong tokbaot hem.

core.title: Kingdom blong God — senta blong tok blong Jisas
core.body: Tok we Jisas i tijim moa long evri samting. Rul blong God olsem King i kam insaed long wol ya wetem Jisas mo bambae i finis taem hem i kambak. Tru long kros mo laef bakegen, Jisas i tru King we i winim sin, ded, mo Setan.
core.vtext: Taem blong hem i stret nao. Taem blong God i kam King blong olgeta man long wol i kam klosap finis. Yufala i mas tanem tingting blong yufala from ol sin blong yufala, yufala i mas bilif long gud nius ya.

core.title: Gud nius — hem i finisim olgeta
core.body: Praes blong sin we mi mi no save pem, Jisas i pem long ples blong mi long kros, mo long laef bakegen hem i winim ded. Mi mi no stanap long “mekem hemia,” be long “olgeta samting i finis nao.”
core.vtext: Olgeta samting i finis nao … God i lavem yumi tumas, mo i soemaot samting ya long yumi long fasin ya we Kraes i ded blong sevem yumi, long taem ya we yumi stap mekem i nogud yet.

mis.w: “From wanem God i mekem ol man we oli save mekem sin? Bambae i no gud moa sipos hem i no mekem yumi nating?”
mis.t: God i mekem wol mo ol man i no from we i sot long wan samting, be from bigfala lav we i fulap tumas. Blong mekem ol man olsem ol man we oli save joen long God hemia hem i lav finis. Mo nating se sin i kam insaed, hemia i no aotsaed long plan blong God blong sevem (Efesas 1:4-5). Fas pija blong Baebol i no jajmen, be hem i lav.

mis.w: “Oli karemaot olgeta mo givim ded long olgeta from wan frut nomo — God i no had tumas?”
mis.t: Blong aot long Iden hemia i jajmen mo kaen fasin tu. Blong kakae long tri blong laef mo laef oltaem long stet ya we i brok mo i seperet long God, hemia bambae i kalabus long harem nogud oltaem (Jenesis 3:22). Blong letem ded i openem rod blong kambak, mo long ples ya nomo God i promes wan Man blong Sevem (Jenesis 3:15). Lav i stap finis insaed long jajmen.

mis.w: “Oli jusum Ebraham from we hem i gat bigfala bilif — ol man blong Baebol oli no ol gudfala man we oli stret evriwan?”
mis.t: Ebraham i giaman mo i gat tu tingting; Jekob i wan man blong trikim. God i no singaot ol man we oli “fit,” be tru long gladhat hem i singaot ol man we oli gat rong. Risen i no gudfala fasin blong olgeta, be lav blong God we i stap strong (Dutronome 7:7-8).

mis.w: “Loa (ol Loa) hemia i no wan tes we yu mas pasem blong yu sev?”
mis.t: God i sevem olgeta bifo hem i givim Loa. Nating Ten Loa i stat wetem wan tok blong sevem: “Mi mi Hae God, mi God blong yufala. Fastaem yufala i slef nomo blong ol man Ijip, be mi mi tekemaot yufala finis, mi sevem yufala” (Eksodas 20:2). Loa i no “folem hem blong yu sev,” be hem i gudfala rod blong soemaot olsem wanem wan pipol we God i sevem finis i mas laef (Dutronome 7:7-9). Gladhat i kam fastaem oltaem; folem hem i ansa nomo.

mis.w: “Winim Kenan i wan kilkil we i no gat sore — taswe God blong Olfala Testemen i had tumas.”
mis.t: Hemia wan had samting we yumi no save finisim long wan laen nomo. Be Baebol i no soemaot hem olsem faet nating, be olsem jajmen afta long plante handred yia we God i wet kwaet long bigfala rabis fasin (wetem kilim ol pikinini olsem sakrefaes) (Jenesis 15:16; Dutronome 9:4-5; Levitikas 18:24-25). God i no kwik blong jajem, mo hem i glad blong tekem olgeta we oli tanem i go long hem — nating se oli man blong narafala kantri olsem Rehab mo Rut (Josua 6:25; Rut 4:13-17).

mis.w: “Deved i wan gudfala man we i no gat rong — taswe oli kolem hem ‘wan man we hat blong hem i folem hat blong God.’”
mis.t: Deved i slip wetem woman blong narafala man mo i kilim man i ded tu. “Wan man we hat blong hem i folem hat blong God” i no minim man we i no gat rong, be man we i no haedem sin blong hem — we i tanem tingting blong hem stret mo i stap kambak long God oltaem (Sam 51). Lav blong God i no sakemaot man we i foldaon strong.

mis.w: “Ol profet oli ol man blong talem samting we bambae i kam / God blong Olfala Testemen i kros nomo.”
mis.t: Hat blong wan profet i no “talem samting we bambae i kam,” be hem i bigfala krae blong God: “Plis kambak.” Nating woning blong jajmen i no blong spolem, be blong tanem ol man mo sevem olgeta — “mi mi no glad nating blong luk wan man nogud i ded long sin blong hem” (Esikel 33:11).

mis.w: “Karemaot i go i soemaot we God i sakemaot Isrel olgeta.”
mis.t: Karemaot i go i no blong sakemaot, be hem i fasin blong stretem mo klinim wan pikinini we God i lavem (Hibrus 12:6). God i no aot; hem i stap wetem Daniel long medel blong taem ya mo i promes se, “Mi mi wantem we bambae yufala i stap gud olwe, trabol bambae i no kasem yufala, mo bambae yufala i stap gogo, yufala i kasem ol samting ya we tingting blong yufala i stap long hem” (Jeremaea 29:11).

mis.w: “Wetem no tok blong 400 yia, God i aot finis no i stap spel.”
mis.t: Kwaet i no minim we hem i no stap. Hem i no toktok nomo, be long taem ya hem i muvum ol bigfala kantri, ol lanwis, mo ol rod blong rerem stej blong sevem. Long taem we i kwaet moa, God i wok strong moa, long lav (Galesia 4:4).

mis.w: “Jisas i wan gudfala tija blong fasin nomo / kros i wan trabol we hem i lus long hem.”
mis.t: Jisas i talem se hem i God hemwan (Jon 8:58), mo kros i no wan aksiden no wan samting we hem i lus long hem, be hem i lav we God i plan finis. Oli no pulum hem i go long fos; hem i lego laef blong hem hemwan (Jon 10:18). “I no gat man we i lavem ol fren blong hem moa, i winim man we i lusum laef blong hem blong i sevem ol fren blong hem” (Jon 15:13).

mis.w: “Jos i wan klab blong ol man we oli stret evriwan, no hem i wan haos nomo.”
mis.t: Jos i no wan grup blong “ol tabu man we oli finis,” be blong ol man nogud we oli kasem fogivnes. Nating aposol Pol i kolem hem se “mi mi nambawan long ol man nogud” (1 Timoti 1:15). Fas jos i raorao mo i foldaon tu (Wok 6:1; 1 Korin 1:11). Hem i no ples blong tok flas, be ol man we oli givim aot lav we oli kasem (Jon 13:34-35).

love: Stori i no stat wetem jajmen, be wetem kriesen we i kamaot long lav we i fulap tumas.
Long taem stret we ol man oli mekem sin, God i promes wan sevem long ples ya nomo.
God i kam fastaem long wan man we i no fit, i singaot hem long nem blong hem, mo i mekem hem i kam rod blong blesing.
Hem i harem krae blong wan pipol we oli slef mo i kamdaon blong sevem olgeta hemwan.
Oli tanem baksaed long hem plante taem, be evri taem oli singaot hem i sanem wan man blong sevem mo i girapem olgeta.
Hem i no sakemaot nating Deved we i foldaon, mo tru long hem i promes wan King we i stap oltaem.
Long pipol we oli tanem baksaed, hem i stap sanem ol profet, i singaot se, “Plis kambak.”
Hem i go wetem olgeta nating long tudak ples blong karemaot i go, mo i promes blong stretem olgeta bakegen.
Nating se pipol i foldaon plante taem, hem i no tekembak promes blong hem.
Nating long 400 yia we i kwaet, we yumi no luk, hem i stap rerem rod blong sevem.
Taem yumi stap man nogud yet, hem i sanem Pikinini blong hem blong lego laef blong hem.
Lav we yumi kasem, naoia hem i sanem i go ron i go long ful wol.
Long en hem i ravemaot evri wota blong ae mo i mekem olgeta samting i kam straet long lav.

s.ui.footer: Baebol long wan skrol · Ol tok blong Baebol i kamaot long Baebol long Bislama
s.hero.kicker: STAT LONG KRIESEN I GO KASEM JOS
s.hero.title:
Baebol,
long wan skrol
s.hero.sub: Long wan skrol nomo, faenemaot bigfala stori blong Baebol — mo from wanem Jisas i kam.
s.thread.eyebrow: WAN TOK WE I HOLEM EVRI SAMTING TUGETA
s.thread.h2: Long en, Baebol i wan stori nomo
s.thread.note: God i promes (kovenan), ol man oli wet longtaem, mo long en evri samting i kamtru mo i finis long Jisas. Folem 13 sin daon ya long fasin ya — tajem “Ridim moa” long evri kad blong kasem dip stori.
s.gospel.eyebrow: STORI YA I MINIM WANEM LONG “MI”
s.gospel.lead: Baebol i no wan buk blong skul blong “kam wan gudfala man.”
s.gospel.sublead: Hem i stori blong olsem wanem God, long gladhat blong hem nomo, i sevem ol man nogud we oli no save sevem olgeta. Long senta blong hem i stanap Jisas Kraes.
s.gospel.mirror:
Fasin blong Isrel we i kam plante taem hem i pija blong “mi” tru

Giaman god→Trabol→Singaot→God i sevem→Giaman god bakegen…

Stat long ol Jajes i go kasem karemaot i go, Isrel i mekem sem fasin ya oltaem. Baebol i no raetem hemia blong yumi laf se, “Olgeta i rabis tumas.”

Hem i wan glas. Poen i no “Isrel i mekem olsem” be “mi mi mekem sem fasin” (1 Korin 10:11).

Wan giaman god i no wan piksa blong wud nomo. Hem i evri samting we yumi lavem no trastem moa long God — mane, win, ol man oli laekem yumi, ol man, mo mi mi wan tu. Mo blong yusum God olsem wan samting blong kasem samting we mi wantem hemia hem i giaman god tu.

Long en, dip giaman god moa hem i “mi mi wan, we mi sidaon long jea blong God.”
s.gospel.coreIntro: Taswe, olsem wanem God i sevem wan man nogud olsem? Hemia senta blong gud nius we Baebol i talemaot.
s.gospel.crux:
Ful Baebol i poenem wan ples nomo.

Ol man oli no save brekem fasin blong sin long olgeta nomo, mo i no gat wan man we i stret. Taswe wan man i mas pem praes long ples blong olgeta.

Jisas i no kam blong givim gudfala tijing nomo. Wetem no narafala rod blong sevem mi, hem i mas kam nomo.

Man we i sud hang long kros ya hem i mi.
Jisas i karem sin blong mi mo oli nilim hem long ples blong mi.

“Be ol man oli stap wipim hem from ol fasin nogud ya blong yumi. Oli mekem hem i karekil from ol sin ya blong yumi … Panis ya we hem i kasem, i mekem we yumi gat pis.” — Aesea 53:5
s.faq.h: Yu stap tingting yet long wan samting?
s.faq.q1: ▸ Taswe wan man we i kilim man i ded i bilif nomo mo i go long heven, be wan gudfala man we i no bilif i go long hel?
s.faq.a1:
Hem i wan gudfala kwestin. Be i gat tu rong tingting i haed insaed long hem.

① Baebol i no seperem ol man long “gud vs. nogud.” Mak i no “gud moa long narafala man” be hem i “tabu fasin blong God we i stret olgeta.” Long fes blong hem, i no gat man we i “gud inaf” (Rom 3:23). Taswe hemia i no “gudfala man vs. wan man we i kilim man,” be hem i olsem tu man we oli gat sem sik we i save kilim olgeta — wan i tekem meresin, narawan i sakemaot, i talem se, “Mi mi gud moa long hem.”

② Wan samting nomo i seperem heven mo hel. I no mak blong fasin, be sipos yu kasem Jisas Kraes olsem Masta mo trabol blong sin blong yu i stret finis. Man we sin blong hem i stret tru long blad blong Kraes i go long heven; man we i no kasem hem, we sin blong hem i stap yet, i no go. I no gat gudfala fasin we i save stretem trabol blong sin ya.

Taswe heven mo hel i no “presen blong gudfala fasin” be hem i samting blong rod wetem Kraes. Mo “bilif” i no agri long tingting nomo, be jenis blong man we i rul long laef blong yu — man we i kasem hem tru i no kam flas, be i tanem tingting moa dip. Tru, fasin blong tingse mi mi stret (“mi mi gudfala man”) hemia giaman god we i had moa blong brekem, we i mekem yumi ting se yumi no nidim Kraes (Luk 18:9-14).

Baebol i talem klia: “Man we i bilif long mi, God i no save jajem hem. Be man we i no bilif long mi, God i jajem hem finis” (Jon 3:18). Jajmen i no “mak blong fasin afta yu ded,” be i stret finis tru long sipos yu kasem Kraes.

Rom 3:23 · Jon 3:18 · Efesas 2:8-9 · Luk 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ Mi mi save laef gud nomo be mi no bilif long Jisas?
s.faq.a2:
Hemia tingting we plante man oli gat, be i no kasem stret wanem tru trabol i. Luk wan pija.

Tingbaot se yu stap long wan sip blong ol pirate. Nating yu klinim dek gud, yu kaen long ol man long sip, yu laef wan gudfala laef — yu wan pirate yet, from we sip i karem yu i go long ples we i stap go long hem (taon blong jajmen). Trabol i no “mak blong fasin” be “yu blong wanem sip” (hu yu yu).

Taswe gud nius i no talem “traem had moa blong kam gud,” be i talem “jenisim sip.” Aot long sip blong sin mo krosem i go long Jisas — long niufala laef blong pikinini blong God. Hemia i no leftemap mak blong yu tru long wok, be trastem Man we i pulum han blong hem mo krosem i go long sip blong hem.

Tru, Baebol i tokbaot sevem olsem jenisim sip ya nomo — “God i tekemaot yumi finis long paoa blong tudak, i putum yumi long paoa blong Pikinini ya blong hem we i lavem hem tumas” (Kolosi 1:13).

No rong: hemia i no minim se gudfala laef i no gat mining. Gudfala fasin i no “kondisen” blong sevem, be hem i frut blong hem. Man we i jenisim sip i laef gud naoia i no from fraet, be from lav blong wan pikinini.

Kolosi 1:13 · Jon 1:12 · Jon 3:3 · Efesas 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ Sipos man we i spolem narafala i stap pis, i talem “God i fogivim mi finis,” be man we i kasem trabol i stap harem nogud yet — fogivnes ya i no jip tumas?
s.faq.a3:
Kwestin ya i stret, mo harem nogud ya i tru. Be tok ya i no “fogivnes blong Baebol” — hem i spolem tok ya.

① Fogivnes blong God i neva jip. Sin i no haed olsem hem i neva hapen; God hemwan i pem praes blong hem wetem laef blong Pikinini blong hem. Kros i no soemaot se sin i smol samting, be se sin i hevi tumas — fogivnes we i kos moa long ful wol.

② Tru tanem tingting i karem frut. Sipos man we i spolem i stap flas long fes blong man we i kasem trabol — “God i fogivim mi, taswe mi mi pis” — hemia i no tanem tingting be hem i kopi blong hem (Matiu 3:8). Mo fogivnes bitwin wan man mo God i no ravemaot soa blong man we i kasem trabol no fosem hem blong fogivim.

③ Sin i neva “letem i go” nomo. Evri sin oli pem long wan long tu ples — Kraes i karem long kros (long man we i bilif i no gat jajmen moa, Rom 8:1), no man we i sakemaot hem long en i karem hemwan. Taswe i no gat “jip fogivnes.” Man we i spolem i karem yet responsabiliti long loa blong wol ya (Rom 13:1-4).

④ Wota blong ae blong man we i kasem trabol i neva smol long fes blong God. God i krae wetem ol man we oli krae, i tingbaot evri wota blong ae, mo long en hem hemwan bambae i ravemaot (Revelesen 21:4). Taswe man we i kasem trabol i no mas karem hevi blong givimbak hemwan, be i save putum long han blong God we i stret (Rom 12:19 — “Fasin ya blong givimbak long man we i mekem i nogud, mi nomo mi gat raet blong mekem. Mo mi bambae mi givimbak”).

Matiu 3:8 · Rom 8:1 · Rom 13:1-4 · Revelesen 21:4
s.faq.q4: ▸ Buk blong God i wan trufala stori, no? I luk olsem wan olfala kastom stori, no wan storian nomo.
s.faq.a4:
Hemia i wan gud kwestin — mo i wan gudfala ples blong stat. Blong gat tu tingting i no semak olsem we yu no gat bilif, be hem i wan tingting blong jekem ol samting long stret fasin. Buk blong God i no wan kastom stori we yu “bilif sipos yu wantem” nomo, be hem i wan rekod we oli raetem antap long ol trufala ples, ol det, mo ol man. Hia i sam smol eksampel nomo.

① Hem i no wan buk nomo, be wan “laebri” — be evri haf i ron i go long wan tingting nomo. Buk blong God i wan kolekson blong 66 buk we oli raetem long raon 1,500 yia, long han blong samwe 40 man — ol king, ol man blong lukaotem sipsip, ol man blong kasem fis, wan man blong tekem takis, wan dokta, ol man blong defren ples mo defren taem, we oli raetem seperet mo oli no save wanwan, long tri lanwis (Hibru, Aramik, Grik). Be evri samting i kam tugeta, wetaot trabol, long wan tingting nomo: salvesen tru long Kraes. Hemia i wan fasin blong gohed stret we i had blong eksplenem we i kam from luk nomo no from ol man we oli plan tugeta.

② Oli stap konfemem hem moa mo moa long graon (akioloji). Plante samting we bifo ol man oli ting se ol man oli wokem nomo, “oli faenem long Buk blong God nomo,” biaen ol digim long graon i konfemem olgeta. Oli faenem laen blong King Deved long wan ston we oli raetem “haos blong Deved” long hem (Tel Dan Stele); oli faenem Pontias Paelat, gavman we i kilim Jisas i ded, long wan raeting we i gat nem blong hem long hem; oli faenem tanel blong wota blong King Hesekaea (2 King 20:20) long trufala tanel ya wetem raeting blong hem. Mo tu, ol man Hit, we bifo oli kolem “wan laen blong ol man we i no trufala,” biaen oli kamaot olsem wan bigfala kingdom long ol rabis ples.

③ Hem i olfala dokumen we oli lukaotem gud moa long evriwan (ol olfala raeting). Long namba blong ol olfala raeting we oli stap yet, long fasin we oli stret wanwan, mo long taem we i pas bitwin we oli raetem fastaem mo we oli kopiem, Buk blong God i winim olgeta olfala dokumen. Skrol blong Aesea bifo long taem blong Kraes, namba wan long ol Skrol blong Det Si (oli faenem long 1947), i stret wetem standa tekis blong raon 1,000 yia biaen kolosap leta long leta — pruf se oli lukaotem gud Buk blong God i stret tru long ol jenerasen.

④ Ol samting we oli raetem bifo oli kamtru stret olsem (profesi). Olfala Testamen, we oli raetem plante handred yia bifo Jisas, i poenem stret long bon blong hem long Betlehem (Maeka 5:2), long man blong wok we i karem trabol (Aesea 53:5), mo long ol samting raon long kros (Sam 22). I tu stret blong sakemaot olsem hem i jas luk nomo.

⑤ Ol man blong histri we oli stap aotsaed long Buk blong God oli raetem hem tu. Man blong histri blong Rom Tasitus mo man blong histri blong ol Jiu Josifas — tufala i no Kristin — tufala i tokbaot Jisas, ded blong hem, mo jos long stat. Antap long evri samting, ol disaepol we oli ronwe from fraet oli givim laef blong olgeta blong stanap witnes long laef bakegen — i no gat man we i ded from wan samting we hem i save se i giaman.

Be blong talem stret, ol pruf ya oli soemaot se blong bilif long Buk blong God i no wan krangke samting be hem i stret long tingting; oli no wan “pruf” we i fosem yu olsem wan matematik fomula. Taswe, blong wan Kristin i gat strong tingting, hem i no kam long ol pruf nomo, be hem i kam long strong tingting we Tabu Spirit i givim long hat taem man i ridim Tok blong God. Buk blong God i talem — “Be ol man oli stap bilif long God, taem oli harem gud nius ya. Mo oli stap harem gud nius ya long ol tok blong Kraes.” (Rom 10:17). Taswe, nating se i luk olsem wan storian, blong ridim hem yu yu wan hem i stat blong hem. Ol pruf oli openem doa, mo strong tingting i gru insaed long man we i ridim.

2 King 20:20 · Aesea 53:5 · Maeka 5:2 · Rom 10:17
s.respond.sub: Lav ya i no infomesen be hem i wan singaot. Sipos lav we oli nilim long ples blong yu i tajem hat blong yu, mekem prea ya isi, wan laen long wan taem.
s.respond.prayer:
God,

mi mi luksave se mi wan man nogud we i no save sevem hemwan.

Mi mi bilif se Jisas i ded long kros from mi mo i laef bakegen.

Plis fogivim ol sin blong mi, mo stat naoia yu kam Masta blong laef blong mi.

Tekem mi olsem pikinini blong yu, mo letem mi laef wan niufala laef.

Long nem blong Jisas mi prea. Amen.
s.respond.after: Sipos yu mekem prea ya long tru hat, Baebol i talem se yu kam pikinini blong God. Yu no stap yu wan moa — faenem wan jos klosap mo wokbaot long rod blong bilif tugeta.
s.respond.read: Ridim Baebol blong yu yet — statem long Jon
s.respond.verse: “Be olgeta we oli glad long hem, mo oli bilif long hem, hem i givim raet long olgeta blong oli kam pikinini blong God.” — Jon 1:12 · Rom 10:9-10
s.closing.main:
Wan God,
tru long wan stori,
i kam biaen long yumi wetem wan
lav we i neva save finis.
s.closing.verse: “I no gat samting … we i save tekemaot yumi long God, we hem i lavem yumi ya tumas, we yumi joen long Jisas Kraes, Masta blong yumi.” — Rom 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
Antap long stori ya, Loa, ol Sing, ol Profet, mo ol Leta oli ademap “mit.”
Naoia, nating wanem buk yu openem, bambae yu luk weples yu stap long stori.
s.about.line: I stanap long tingting blong histri blong sevem (evanjelikal · rifom) we plante long jos Protestan blong Korea oli serem.
s.about.contact: Ol kwestin · tingting — Sanem imel
